form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Magnificent Storm, who he meets again; was restrained, when 18 metres seventh at Bunbury over 2569m in a G3 No NR race on March 28. First four hope from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 1.5 m finishing third behind Chaco Eagle at this track over 2130m in a 4yo+ 2-4W/17 0K stake on March 20 at $6. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.4 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Magnificent Storm at Bunbury over 2569m in a G3 No NR on March 28 at $13. Won't be easy to turn the tables on Magnificent Storm but is working up to a win.

form.formComment: Seven-year-old gelding showed improvement last start. 2nd (Fr9) over 2130m after showing early speed at this track beaten a nose by Tualou (2:33.40) in NR up to 110 on April 3 at $5. The run before was not as impressive when well beaten into fifth behind Magnificent Storm at Bunbury over 2569m in a G3 No NR on March 28 at $61. Not keen.

form.formComment: Looks well placed in this tougher race, but he was impressive winning last start [-+] won by 1.4 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Bunbury (3:06.50) beating Hugotastic in G3 No NR on March 28 at $1.06. Has been impeccable so far this campaign and should be winning again.
